feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is it OK to overwrite details for standard Cost Center Categories in S/4HANA Public Cloud? 102498
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

11 Cost Center Categories are provided in S/4HANA Public Cloud:

The customer needs different Cost Center Category definitions (i.e. different names, check-box defaults and functional area) but the Cost Centre Category itself is only 1 alphanumeric character and there are namespace restrictions:

making the creation of new Cost Center Categories quite restricted. 

Help for the SSCUI (102498) does not clarify whether - if changes are needed - it is OK to change the SAP-supplied Cost Center Categories.  It's presumed that this is OK/low-risk, but we would like official confirmation of this before we proceed. 

Please can you confirm whether it is OK for us to change the name, check-boxes and functional area for SAP-supplied Cost Center Categories? 

Many thanks,

Jules

entry.title: Action In ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a SAP RAP and use Actions following the provided instructions (Actions).  How to set Group Two Action in Select like below Picture?

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: The PR/PO does not commit the budget
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have planned Budget for WBS C-25-OPD01-00CO-IN for 100,000 THB. 

When I created PO by specify WBS and amount is 599,999 THB. The commitment report doesn’t show commitment and not show warning budget. 

But I have created a supplier invoice, there is a warning as below.

Reference for Configuration

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: How to short automatic packing HU in putaway
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Our client would like the system to automatically pack Handling Units (HUs) in an inbound delivery based on predefined packing instructions.

Current Packing Instruction Setup:

  • 1 P = 1 PC

  • 1 M = 40 PC

When receiving 150 PC, the system currently creates the following HU split:

  • HU1 = 30 PC

  • HU2 = 40 PC

  • HU3 = 40 PC

  • HU4 = 40 PC

However, the expected packing result should be:

  • HU1 = 40 PC

  • HU2 = 40 PC

  • HU3 = 40 PC

  • HU4 = 30 PC

How to maintain the system fills full HUs (40 PC per HU) first, and only assigns the remaining quantity (30 PC) to the last HU. Is there any configuration related to this?

 

Regards,

Melani

entry.title: Transfer historical unbilled revenue to Enteprise project
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a cost based POC project in EPPM and i'm trying to move historical unbilled revenue from older system to New public cloud.

Can you tell how can i create a GL account entry to add unbilled revenue against my project so that it shows in event based revenue recognition. Sharing the template in attachment

Thanks,

Nikhil

entry.title: How can I request the TDR (Test Data Refresh) service and what are the associated costs?
entry.content:
Hello,

As mentioned in the title, I would like to know how to request the TDR (Test Data Refresh) service and what the associated costs are.

I've reviewed the available documentation and key Q&A resources, but I may have missed the relevant information. I would appreciate any guidance or references you could provide regarding this process.

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Ledger 4G defined in CoCd ×××× is not active in SAP Public Cloud Asset Accounting
entry.content:
When posting acquisition value to fixed assets, the system reported an error: "Ledger 4G defined in CoCd ×××× is not active in Asset Accounting". According to SAP Note 3447821, we attempted to assign the accounting principle to ledger 4G/company code in CBC, Meanwhile, Ledger 0L has also adopted the same accounting principle, but the system did not allow saving and reported an error. The error screenshot is as follows:

Also attached are other relevant screenshots：

entry.title: Account object Profit Center differs from that in asset master record upon DATA MIGRATION
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Would like to know how to solve this issue, " Account object Profit Center differs from that in asset master record" Message AAPO189.

Reproducing the issue ;

1. Upload file for data migration - Source Data for Fixed asset - postings. 

2. Upon simulation, error messagfe AAPO189 is received. 

 

Cost centers and profit centers are properly aligned and setup in the system. We can't identify the source of this error.

Thanks.

Regards, 

Melle 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: A standard product proposal procedure O00001 and B00001
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like to understand the behavior of a standard product proposal procedures O00001 Online-Read Proposal, and B00001 Batch exp. Smoothing, which are used for Procedure Determination in the Intelligent Product Proposal.
My assumption is that, when the procedures O00001 or B00001 are used, the system searches for a relevant sales order history and the history record is hold in the system on a monthly basis, that is, in a sales order creation by like VA01 the system checks the history record for the previous month or before that.
For example, when I try to create a sales order in July, the system searches for a sales order history that were created in the previous month June or before that.
Can somebody answer if my assumption as above is correct.

Thank you and regards,

Yasuyo Goto

entry.title: How to assign Man-hour to PS module in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

If I would link to assign timesheet to WBS via ref. resource without record timesheet at "My Timesheet" app. how to add cost man hour to WBS directly.?

If I don't want to record timesheet this app.

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Way to automatically remove roles from users who haven't accessed the system
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there a way to automatically remove roles  from users who haven't accessed the server for a long time?

I heard that Ariba has automatic user (unused) lock in the system.

Please let me know if there are any similar features.

This is one of the requirements for an audit.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Official Documentation on Enabling Self-Use Users with 30:1 FUE Ratio in S/4HANA Cloud Starter Syste
entry.content:
Hi all,

An initial check on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Starter System showed that Self-Use users (counted at a 30:1 FUE ratio) can be enabled for:

  • Purchase Requisition creation (app F2229)

  • Purchase Requisition approval

  • Goods Receipt posting

Looking for official SAP documentation to confirm this and guidance on how to enable these users properly.

Any pointers or help would be appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: Loan Process in sap s4 hana public cloud
entry.content: There are 27 companies for my client, each of which is created as a company code. They will provide loans internally and earn interest at the specified rate. They also get loans from the bank and distribute the funds to other companies. Is there a process in SAP S/4HANA that I can provide for them? Instead of putting a manual JV.

entry.title: Adjusting Reconciliation Account in Asset Accounting – Options in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear community,
We have a problem with a customer who has only now, three months after going live, noticed that something is not quite right in the asset account determination and that inventory postings have therefore been posted to the wrong reconciliation account. They now want to post the entry to a different reconciliation account. In the private cloud, this can be done via the OAMK by specifying that the account is no longer a reconciliation account, and then the transfer posting can be carried out. However, as far as I know, there is no way to do this in the public cloud. How could the asset account determination be assigned to the other reconciliation account? The previous one has already been posted and cannot be changed in theory. 
Does anyone have any ideas or tips?
I would be very grateful.
Many thanks and best regards,
Vanessa

entry.title: ILM Archiving of EPPM projects
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to archive EPPM projects in the system. I followed the steps in 1KA scope item to do the archiving. But when I try to activate the ILM business rule for the object, it gives me a message "ILM object /S4PPM/PRO not supported for rule generation". Hence we are unable to proceed with the next steps.

We have assigned the object /S4PPM/PRO to the relevant audit area and maintained the ILM policies and rules.

Does anyone has prior experience with EPPM project archiving? Or if you have inputs, please help in understanding the issue.

Best regards,

Francisco Costa

entry.title: Unable to Deselect "Goods Receipt" Checkbox in Config ID 101815
entry.content:
We are working within SAP S/4HANA Public Edition and currently trying to maintain the account assignment categories via Configuration Activity ID 101815 (Maintain Account Assignment Categories).

We have encountered an issue where the "Goods Receipt" checkbox is grayed out and cannot be deselected for Account Assignment Category K (Cost Center). I want to understand whether this behavior is standard in the Public Edition, and if so, the reasoning behind it.

Additionally, we have deselected "Goods Receipt-Based Invoice Verification" in the Purchasing Organization view of the vendor master data. However, when creating a Purchase Order using Account Assignment K, the "Goods Receipt" checkbox remains ticked by default.

Could you please clarify:

  1. Why the "Goods Receipt" checkbox is locked for Account Assignment K in this configuration?

  2. Whether there is a supported way in the Public Edition to create a PO without goods receipt for cost center assignments without creating a custom Account assignment Category?

Thank you in advance, Sara

entry.title: Scope Item 5HP: Combine several stock transport orders into one outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I am looking for a way to combine several stock transport orders with the same goods recipient into one outbound delivery in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Process flow:

  1. Create intercompany stock transport orders > ME21N - Create Purchase Order - Advanced
  2. Create replenishment delivery for stock transport order  > VL10B My Purchase Orders - Due for Delivery

In the second step, I am looking for a way to select several stock transport orders and combine them into one outbound delivery.

Thanks and best regards, 

Matthias

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP TM public cloud manually change between FTL and LTL
entry.content:
Hi Community,

In our S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant we use Transportation Management.
When I create a Road Freight Order I only get one document type – SFO2 (Road Freight Order) – and it is hard-wired to Shipping Type 18 (FTL).
The Shipping Type field itself is read-only, and the usual SSCUI “Define Freight Order Types” (103983) does not exist in Public Cloud.

Questions

  1. What is the supported way to make Shipping Type 17 (LTL) available?

  2. Do we have to raise a Request Expert Configuration so SAP copies SFO2 and sets Shipping Type 17, or is there any self-service alternative?

  3. Could condition-based FO-type determination switch between FTL and LTL at planning/tender time?

  4. Any best-practice tips from projects that already solved this?

(See screenshot below – Shipping Type is locked on FTL.)

 

The ultimate situation I would like is if I can manually choose between FTL or LTL. 

Thanks for any insights!

Best regards,
Floris

entry.title: Schedule Daily Delta Accruals - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all, 

We are facing a challenge with "Schedule Contract Settlement - Customer Contracts" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

We are looking to schedule the Delta Accruals settlement to run recurringly (daily), considering only the period up to the execution date. 

However, we've encountered the following behavior: 

      - The app requires a fixed settlement date.

      - If a broad date range is entered (e.g 01.01 - 31.12), the system processes the entire period at once.

      - There does not appear to be an option to use a dynamic date

We would like to know if there is any official or recommended approach to schedule Delta Accruals with a dynamic settlement date (e.g "today"). 

Thank you in advance for any guidance.

entry.title: Migration Template not available for App " Manage Rentable Object" in SAP CLM
entry.content:
In SAP Contract and Lease Management, Migration Template is not available for Application " Manage Rentable Object" but the Template is available for Application "Manage usable Object". How to get it, Please guide.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
